form.formComment: At the latest run couldn't go on with it; ran last of 8 at Ascot Grad Hcp 60+ on March 21 over 1000m, 8 len behind Cannykev with 58kg at $31. Before that led to the turn then faded ran last of 10 at Belmont Park 0Mwly on February 18 over 1200m, 11 len behind Snippy Which with 59kg at $31. This suits him much better and he can return to his best form.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Comes off a 40 day let-up. Most recently raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 2nd of 9 at this track Rtg 58+ on February 28 over 1417m, neck behind The Rush carrying 60kg at $3.50. The race before that rolled along in front then was edged out late 2nd of 12 at this track Cl5 on February 5 over 1400m, 0.7 len behind Scurgeofthewest carrying 58.5kg at $16. Can sit on the speed and make a statement.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Contacted by another runner near the 150m.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Last start ran on strongly from last on the turn; 3rd of 10 at this track Rtg 58+ on March 13 over 1100m, 1.1 len behind Luckee Floran with 56kg at $3.60. The race before that 3rd of 9 at this track Rtg 58+ on February 28 over 1417m, 0.9 len behind The Rush carrying 55kg at $3.60. Rise in trip suits and she can make her presence felt again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Commenced awkwardly unbalancing its rider and bumped.

form.formComment: Gelding returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last campaign sixth of 12 at Carnarvon Rtg 56+ August 17 over 1700m, 6 len behind Jiddo carrying 53.5kg at $7.50. Previous preparation first-up won by 1.1 len Carnarvon Mdn May 17 over 1000m defeating Mystery Minute carrying 58kg at $4. Can feature on resumption.

formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2.5). Gelding returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. form.formComment: Mare returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last campaign third of 12 at this track Cl5 February 5 over 1400m, 1.4 len behind Scurgeofthewest carrying 54kg at $8.50. First up last campaign third of 8 at Belmont Park Westspeed 0Mwly September 20 over 1200m, soft track; 2.5 len behind Hymns Of Eladdair carrying 54kg at $51. Comes through a strong form race last time out and can be in the finish again off a freshen.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Impeded for clear running in the early part of the straight.

form.formComment: Returns from a 49-day let-up. Most recently got back early 8th of 10 at this track Rtg 57+ on February 19 over 1600m, 7 len behind Let's Sea with 55kg at $26. The run before that 10th of 12 at this track Cl5 on February 5 over 1400m, 8 len behind Scurgeofthewest carrying 52.5kg at $71. Needs to improve sharply.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0.5). Returns from a 49-day let-up. Most recently got back early 8th of 10 at this track Rtg 57+ on February 19 over 1600m, 7 len behind Let's Sea with 55kg at $26. The run before that 10th of 12 at this track Cl5 on February 5 over 1400m, 8 len behind Scurgeofthewest carrying 52.5kg at $71. Needs to improve sharply.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up in the past. First-up came from midfield; 3rd of 10 at this track Rtg 58+ on February 19 over 1200m, 0.9 len behind Bonny Rock with 52kg at $26. Second run from a spell 5th of 10 at this track Rtg 58+ on March 13 over 1100m, 2.5 len behind Luckee Floran carrying 54kg at $4.60. Goes well at this track and trip and can strike third-up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(-0.5). Third-up today and won third-up in the past. Second run from a spell 5th of 10 at this track Rtg 58+ on March 13 over 1100m, 2.5 len behind Luckee Floran carrying 54kg at $4.60. Goes well at this track and trip and can strike third-up.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced keenly in the early and middle stages.
Slow into stride, losing several lengths.

form.formComment: At the latest run raced on the pace before fading 10th of 12 at this track Rtg 64+ on March 13 over 1600m, 6 len behind Kentucky Blue with 55kg at $21. The race before that did the work up front then tired 6th of 10 at this track Rtg 57+ on February 19 over 1600m, 4.5 len behind Let's Sea with 54kg at $3.90. Looking to others.
